name: CONGENITAL HEPATIC FIBROSIS
definition: congenital cirrhosis with rapid + fatal progression

demographics.Histo: fibrous tissue within hepatic parenchyma with excess numbers of distorted terminal

discriminating_features: atrophy of right lobe + normal / enlarged medial segment of left lobe + hypertrophy of left
enlarged hepatic artery associated with large multiacinar regenerative nodules

general: atrophy of right lobe + normal / enlarged medial segment of left lobe + hypertrophy of left
enlarged hepatic artery associated with large multiacinar regenerative nodules

clinical.Cx: cirrhosis, portal hypertension, hepatocellular carcinoma, cholangiocellular carcinoma
